why.mainIdea: a temporary and unique endeavor designed to produce a product, service or result with a defined beginning and end undertaken to meet unique goals and objectives
why.centralIdea: why Project Management matters — a temporary and unique endeavor designed to produce a product service or

claims.fact: A project is a temporary and unique endeavor designed to produce a product, service or result with a defined beginning and end  undertaken to meet unique goals and objectives, typically to bring about beneficial change or added value.[3][4] The temporary nature of projects stands in contrast with business as usual ,[5] which are repetitive, permanent or semi-permanent functional activities to produce products or services.
